/usr/bin/c++  -DNDEBUG -fno-delete-null-pointer-checks -fno-lifetime-dse -fno-aggressive-loop-optimizations -fno-strict-overflow -Wl,--version-script=/home/dia/github/ACGC-PC-Port/pc/version_script.lds -Wl,--allow-multiple-definition @CMakeFiles/ac_pc.dir/objects1.rsp @CMakeFiles/ac_pc.dir/objects2.rsp @CMakeFiles/ac_pc.dir/objects3.rsp -o bin/AnimalCrossing  libglad.a /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libSDL2.so -ldl -lpthread -lm /usr/lib/arm-linux-gnueabihf/libGLESv2.so
